summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: colored grid (BLUE→GREEN horizontal, ORANGE→RED vertical lines) deformed by A=[[2, 1], [1, 2]] then B=[[-1, 0], [-0.5, -0.5]] via ValueTracker stage_tr ∈ [0, 2]. always_redraw rebuilds grid + GREEN î / RED ĵ basis arrows.
